description_long: This is a metallic kettle with an octagonal body and a long, straight spout extending from one side. The kettle features a flat, removable lid with a small central knob for easy handling. A sturdy, angular handle is attached to the opposite side of the spout, providing a secure grip for pouring. The base of the kettle is flat, allowing it to rest stably on surfaces. The surface is plain and matte, with no visible decorative patterns or embellishments. The overall color is a muted gray, suggesting a utilitarian design suitable for urban environments.
description: A plain, gray metallic kettle with an octagonal body, long spout, flat lid with knob, and angular side handle.
description_view_0: Front view shows the spout's perforated tip and the octagonal body with the lid and knob visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the long, straight spout and the angular handle on the opposite side.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the kettle and the handle's attachment, with the spout mostly hidden.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the handle and the full length of the spout extending outward.
